query: global data center electricity demand 2030 forecast TWh

contradiction.description: US-only figure presented against a global question (scope trap).

sources.title: Electricity 2024: data centre demand
sources.snippet: Global data centre electricity demand could reach about 945 TWh by 2030, roughly doubling from 2022 levels.

sources.title: Annual Energy Outlook: data centres
sources.snippet: Worldwide data centre consumption is projected near 970 TWh in 2030 under the reference case.

sources.title: Data centre power demand to double by decade end
sources.snippet: Analysts expect global data centre electricity use around 960 TWh by 2030.

sources.title: Data centers will need 600 TWh
sources.snippet: US data centers alone could consume 600 TWh by 2030, a staggering rise.

query: Does creatine supplementation improve cognitive performance?

sources.title: Creatine and cognition: a meta-analysis
sources.snippet: Pooled results suggest a small improvement in short-term memory, strongest under sleep deprivation.

sources.title: Creatine supplementation review
sources.snippet: Evidence for cognitive benefit is mixed but promising in stressed populations.

sources.title: Creatine makes you smarter, period
sources.snippet: Anecdotes claim dramatic IQ gains from creatine.

query: What is the scientific consensus on microplastics and human health?

sources.title: Microplastics in human tissue
sources.snippet: Particles are detectable in blood and placenta; health effects remain under active study.

sources.title: Microplastics in drinking water
sources.snippet: Current evidence does not indicate a clear health risk at observed levels, but data are limited.

sources.title: Microplastics are poisoning everyone
sources.snippet: Sensational claims of imminent harm without peer-reviewed support.

query: average lithium-ion battery pack cost per kWh 2025

contradiction.description: An outdated cell-only price misread as a pack price.

sources.title: Battery price survey 2025
sources.snippet: Average pack prices fell to about 115 USD per kWh in 2025.

sources.title: Battery costs outlook
sources.snippet: Pack prices are near 120 USD per kWh in 2025 and continue to decline.

sources.title: Batteries still cost 300 per kWh
sources.snippet: A 2016 figure of 300 USD per kWh, quoted as if current.

query: global adult literacy rate latest estimate percent

sources.title: Adult literacy
sources.snippet: The global adult literacy rate is about 87 percent.

sources.title: Literacy rate, adult total
sources.snippet: World Bank estimates adult literacy near 86 percent.

sources.title: Most adults can read
sources.snippet: Roughly 86 to 88 percent of adults worldwide are literate.

query: Is moderate coffee consumption associated with cardiovascular risk?

sources.title: Coffee and cardiovascular outcomes
sources.snippet: Moderate intake (3 to 4 cups) is associated with lower cardiovascular mortality in cohort studies.

sources.title: Coffee and heart health
sources.snippet: Most evidence suggests neutral to modestly protective associations at moderate intake.

sources.title: Coffee wrecks your heart
sources.snippet: Claims of severe harm not supported by cohort data.

query: utility scale solar LCOE 2024 USD per MWh

sources.title: Renewable power generation costs
sources.snippet: Global utility-scale solar LCOE averaged about 44 USD per MWh in 2024.

sources.title: Levelized cost of energy
sources.snippet: Unsubsidized solar LCOE ranged near 40 to 50 USD per MWh in 2024.

sources.title: PRODES deforestation monitoring
sources.snippet: Deforestation in the Brazilian Amazon fell about 22 percent in 2023.

sources.title: Amazon loss slows
sources.snippet: Satellite data indicate a roughly 22 percent decline in clearing during 2023.

query: annual deaths attributable to air pollution worldwide

sources.title: Ambient air pollution
sources.snippet: Air pollution is linked to about 7 million premature deaths per year.

sources.title: Global burden of pollution
sources.snippet: Estimates attribute around 6.7 million deaths annually to air pollution.

query: Does remote work increase or decrease productivity?

sources.title: Remote work and productivity
sources.snippet: Hybrid arrangements show small productivity gains and improved retention.

sources.title: Working from home research
sources.snippet: Fully remote effects vary by task; hybrid is broadly neutral to positive.

sources.title: Remote workers do nothing
sources.snippet: Opinion piece asserting large productivity losses without evidence.

query: When is the ozone layer projected to fully recover?

sources.title: Ozone layer assessment
sources.snippet: The ozone layer is on track to recover to 1980 levels around 2066 over Antarctica.

sources.title: Ozone recovery timeline
sources.snippet: Full recovery is expected by roughly 2066 for the Antarctic, earlier elsewhere.

query: number of internet users worldwide 2024 billion

sources.title: Measuring digital development
sources.snippet: About 5.4 billion people were online in 2024.

sources.title: Individuals using the internet
sources.snippet: Roughly 5.3 billion internet users were recorded in 2024.

query: Does vitamin D supplementation reduce respiratory infections?

sources.title: Vitamin D and respiratory infections
sources.snippet: Meta-analysis finds a small protective effect, largest in deficient individuals.

sources.title: Vitamin D review
sources.snippet: Modest reduction in infection risk; effect size is small overall.

query: projected global sea level rise by 2100 centimeters

contradiction.description: A fringe multi-meter figure far outside the assessed range.

sources.title: Sea level projections
sources.snippet: Likely global mean sea level rise is about 44 to 76 cm by 2100 under intermediate scenarios.

sources.title: Sea level change
sources.snippet: Projections cluster around 50 to 70 cm by 2100 for moderate emissions.

sources.title: Oceans to rise 5 meters by 2100
sources.snippet: A claim of 500 cm of rise by 2100, far above assessed ranges.

query: India real GDP growth rate 2024 percent

sources.title: World Economic Outlook: India
sources.snippet: India's real GDP is estimated to grow about 7 percent in 2024.

sources.title: India growth update
sources.snippet: Growth is projected near 6.8 percent for 2024.
